findings.design_reference: FR-011 / Get-ContinuousCoReviewSlimPrompt step 2 / final-round unresolved prior blocking findings
findings.comment: FINAL ROUND ESCALATION: prior blocking missing-review-context remains unresolved. This run itself contains an empty .review/design bundle and .review/process/process-context.md has a blank Active feature with no copied plan/tasks/state snapshots, while Invoke-ContinuousCoReviewWorktreeReviewRun still continues after Resolve-ContinuousCoReviewWorktreeDesignContext returns an empty list. Stop the autonomous review->fix loop and require a human decision before accepting further co-review evidence. While checking the final round, the prior schema-invalid partial-harvest risk also still appears unresolved: Get-ContinuousCoReviewHarvestedPartialResult still adds any JSONL object with a comment property directly to findings without item-schema validation.
